title: Rocket Man
why_this_song: Present continuous narration from an astronaut's point of view. Great for introducing time-expression vocabulary and 'burn out' idioms.
grammar_callouts: present simple for habits: she packs my bags

exercises.prompt_en: Fill the blank in this line:

exercises.teacher_note: Auto-generated from synced lyrics — add the model translation when reviewing.

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Elton John one question about "Rocket Man", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Elton John sobre "Rocket Man", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Match each English word or phrase to its Portuguese meaning.
exercises.prompt_pt: Associe cada palavra ou expressão em inglês ao significado em português.

exercises.prompt_en: Put the words in the right order:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque as palavras na ordem certa:

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "long" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "long" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: She packed my bags last night, pre-flight
It's just my job five days a week

teaching_notes_md: **Pedagogy:** Lyrical imagery around space — teach the vocabulary clusters (Mars, kite, high, fuse). Strong narrative voice for retell exercises.

lines: Rocket man, burning out his fuse up here alone
And I think it's gonna be a long, long time
'Til touchdown brings me 'round again to find
